title: Implement PSD (radially averaged power spectrum) metric
description: Add spectral.py with radially_averaged_psd(). Test with known spectral properties. Most important beyond-pixel metric.

title: Implement rank histogram + spread-skill ratio
description: Add calibration.py with rank_histogram() and spread_skill_ratio(). Standard probabilistic calibration diagnostics.

title: Implement SSIM metric
description: Add structural.py with ssim(). Structural similarity captures luminance/contrast/structure.

title: Implement KL divergence / distribution comparison
description: Add distributional.py with kl_divergence(). Compares predicted vs true PDFs.

title: Run comprehensive evaluation on all models + write report
description: Run all new metrics on all trained models. Compare models. Write report tracked in git.
